entity.summary: Indian centralized cryptocurrency exchange platform providing account-based digital-asset trading, order matching, banking and payment integrations, and security and compliance controls.
entity.notes: Current first-party website and About page identify Giottus as an Indian cryptocurrency trading platform and describe its trading engine, order-matching infrastructure, banking and payment integrations, compliance controls, and founders. Exact launch date is not asserted in this initial record.

evidence.title: About Giottus
evidence.notes: First-party About page describes Giottus as a cryptocurrency trading platform, identifies its founders, and documents trading-engine, order-matching, banking, security, and compliance capabilities.

evidence.title: Giottus official exchange website
evidence.notes: Current first-party exchange website remains available and presents Giottus as an Indian cryptocurrency exchange and trading platform.

evidence.title: Giottus exchange discovery entry
evidence.notes: Secondary exchange registry corroborates the Giottus exchange identity and dedicated domain; first-party sources remain the status and classification authority.
